name: Coconut Rum Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure 30 ml of lime juice and pour into a cocktail shaker or mixing bowl.
2. Measure 60 ml of simple syrup and add to the shaker or bowl.
3. Add 90 ml of rum, ensuring it is either light or dark based on preference.
4. Pour in 120 ml of young coconut-nut juice (or young coconut juice from an Asian food store if fresh coconut is unavailable).
5. Securely attach the lid and shake vigorously until well combined with ice cubes for about 15-20 seconds.
6. Strain the mixture into a tall glass filled with ice.
7. Garnish with a lime leaf for serving.
Serves 1 (lavishly).
